languageRule: All user-facing follow-up messages should use the user's dominant language from the current conversation. If the user switches language explicitly, follow the latest clear preference. Use English only when the user is speaking English or explicitly asked for English.
confirmationPrompt: The reference image is ready. Should I revise the image first or launch the Tripo 3D generation now?
confirmationPromptWithCost: The reference image is ready. Should I revise the image first or launch the Tripo 3D generation now? Estimated Tripo cost: <credit_estimate> credits<usd_suffix>.
confirmationPromptWithBalanceOnly: The reference image is ready. Should I revise the image first or launch the Tripo 3D generation now? Current wallet balance: <wallet_balance> credits.
confirmationPromptWithCostAndBalance: The reference image is ready. Should I revise the image first or launch the Tripo 3D generation now? Estimated Tripo cost: <credit_estimate> credits<usd_suffix>. Current wallet balance: <wallet_balance> credits.
confirmationPromptWhenExactCostUnknown: The reference image is ready. Should I revise the image first or launch the Tripo 3D generation now? I do not have a verified exact per-task credit amount from the current official Tripo docs, so I will only proceed after your approval.
postConfirmationBehavior: continue immediately with the Tripo API in the same turn
postImageGenerationBehavior: do not stop on the generated image alone; continue in the same turn with the next required step
postTaskStartBehavior: do not silently poll after the Tripo task starts; tell the user that generation has started and include a best-effort wait estimate before continuing to poll
postImageChecklist: briefly restate the selected style and requested download format
tell the user that they can still request a reference-image revision before spending Tripo credits
include the current wallet balance when it was verified successfully
postTaskStartChecklist: say clearly that the Tripo task has started
include the task id when it is available
say that the estimate is not a guaranteed API ETA when the current official docs do not expose one
continue polling and report the final task status in the same turn
taskStartedPrompt: Tripo 3D generation started. I am polling the task now.
taskStartedPromptWithEstimate: Tripo 3D generation started. Estimated wait: <wait_estimate>. I am polling the task now.
taskStartedPromptWithTaskId: Tripo 3D generation started. Task id: <task_id>. Estimated wait: <wait_estimate>. I am polling the task now.
taskStartedPromptWhenExactEtaUnknown: Tripo 3D generation started. Estimated wait: <wait_estimate>. The current official Tripo API docs I could verify do not expose an exact ETA field, so this remains a best-effort estimate while I poll the task.
requiredNextStepAfterImage: ask for image revision approval when the reference still needs user approval
run the wallet check before any paid Tripo task when handoff was requested
ask the Tripo confirmation question with current balance context when approval is still required
continue directly to Tripo only when approval was already explicit
revisionLoopRule: If the user requests changes to the generated reference image, revise the image first and ask the Tripo confirmation question again only after the revised image is ready.

localViewer.archiveBehavior: extract first supported preview file from zip when possible
